## Create Your Unique Career – It’s Worth the Leap
At SCALINQ, we believe that the most rewarding careers are built at the edge of the unknown, where your individual talent meets the world’s most complex challenges. By joining us, you aren't just taking a job; you are choosing to master the high-density hardware solutions that define the future of quantum computing. This journey requires ambition and a drive for excellence, but the payoff is a professional identity defined by true ownership and groundbreaking impact. We provide the platform and the autonomy for you to carve out a path that is entirely your own, supported by a team of world-class experts. It is a bold move to help scale a new era of technology, but for those ready to lead, the personal and professional growth is well worth it.
## Workplace and Culture
You aren’t just joining a company; you’re joining a community of experts solving the complex puzzles of the quantum world. Based in Gothenburg, our team thrives on diverse perspectives and a culture that values your authentic self as much as your technical brilliance. Together, we bridge cultures and disciplines to turn ambitious ideas into reality. Come meet the team scaling the future—one breakthrough at a time.

## Benefits
  * ### Focus On You & Your Wellbeing
We want you to thrive, both at work and in your free time. That’s why we offer a generous health and wellness allowance covering everything from fitness to relaxation, as well as a nice package of health and pension insurances to ensure your long-term security. We value your recovery and provide annual leave with the added flexibility of public holidays (röda dagar) and advanced holidays.
  * ### Benefits in the Office
At our office, we believe in a warm and inviting atmosphere where there is always fresh fruit, bread, and a hot cup of coffee or tea waiting for you. We love gathering for a social lunch together every Friday to wrap up the week, creating a space where we can connect and recharge. It’s all about making sure you feel right at home while we build the future together!

## Welcome to a place where your drive defines your future
At SCALINQ, we value your mindset and ambition above any checklist of skills. With research in our roots and Creativity in our DNA, we provide a unique space for deep-tech innovation where your ideas can truly take flight. Our culture is built on Trust, giving you the safety to take risks and align your daily work with a Holistic vision of a better world. If you have the Passion to push beyond limits, we are committed to investing in your long-term growth. This is where your journey starts—welcome to the team.

## About SCALINQ
**Good Solutions****Can’t Be Developed Behind Closed Doors**
At SCALINQ, we develop high-performance hardware—such as advanced RF packaging and cryogenic components—to enable the scaling of quantum computers. Rooted in research from Chalmers University of Technology, our team blends global expertise in quantum engineering with Gothenburg’s collaborative spirit and drive for innovation.
